prompt: A surreal dinner party scene viewed from above. Every guest at the table is turned away from their own small cluster, gazing toward a larger, more animated group nearby. That larger group is itself turned toward an even larger gathering. The composition spirals outward — each cluster bigger than the last — yet the outermost group also gazes inward toward the center with longing. No one looks satisfied with their own group. The scene is simultaneously intimate and infinite. Painterly, cinematic overhead shot, warm amber light, photorealistic. No text, no numbers, no labels, no mathematical notation.
visual_logic: Concentric rings of diners each gaze toward the next larger ring, embodying how every node perceives its neighbors as more connected — a spiral where everyone feels peripheral yet the structure is perfectly symmetric.
